episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 358: All Will Be One Leaks
episode.description: James and Derek walk you through all the latest in Magic the Gathering finance including your weekly Meta update, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and quick takes on the leaked All Will Be One rare cards.
